command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws['A1'] = 'Employee'
ws['B1'] = 'Completion Rate(%)'
ws['C1'] = 'Rating'
ws['A2'] = 'Liu Yang'
ws['B2'] = 95
ws['C2'] = 'Excellent'
ws['A3'] = 'Chen Jing'
ws['B3'] = 82
ws['C3'] = 'Good'
ws['A4'] = 'Lin Feng'
ws['B4'] = 88
ws['C4'] = 'Good'
ws['A5'] = 'Huang Li'
ws['B5'] = 97
ws['C5'] = 'Excellent'
wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/employee_kpi.xlsx')
"

phases.instruction: Find employees rated 'Excellent' from /home/user/Desktop/employee_kpi.xlsx, append to /home/user/Desktop/kpi_record.txt: 'Excellent Employees: Liu Yang, Huang Li', save

include: Excellent Employees: Liu Yang, Huang Li
